auth.signInSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
auth.signUpSubtitle: Create your account in seconds. No approval required.
auth.heroDesc: Your AI Receptionist replies in seconds, answers from your knowledge base, and turns Messenger chats into booked appointments and qualified leads.

analytics.title: Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your bot today.

aiUsage.title: AI Usage
aiUsage.subtitle: Track your bot's AI credit consumption.

credits.title: Credits & Billing
credits.subtitle: Your credit balance and recharge info.
credits.rechargeStep1: Contact the admin to request a recharge
credits.rechargeStep2: Send your payment using the agreed method
credits.rechargeStep3: Share your transaction reference — credits will be added to your account
credits.rechargeNote: Credits are usually updated within 1-2 hours.
credits.botIntro: When someone messages your Facebook page, our AI bot automatically replies.
credits.botCan2: Identify products from photos and reply with prices
credits.botCan4: Reply in the language you configured
credits.tip1: Set Auto-Reply rules for common questions (Free!)
credits.tip2: Add common questions to your FAQ list

botSettings.title: Bot Settings
botSettings.subtitle: Customize how your AI bot responds to customers.
botSettings.businessInfoDesc: Tell the AI about your business so it can represent you well.
botSettings.welcomeDesc: The first message customers receive when they message your page. Write it in the language you want the bot to use.
botSettings.customInstructionsDesc: Give the AI specific instructions on how to behave. Write in plain text.
botSettings.customInstructionsPh: e.g. Always mention free delivery for orders above $500. Don't discuss competitor products.
botSettings.commentFeedDesc: Control how the bot handles comments and page posts.
botSettings.aiCommentsDesc: Use AI to reply to comments intelligently instead of static text
botSettings.autoImportDesc: When you post a photo on your page, AI analyzes it and creates a pending product
botSettings.fbConnectionDesc: Use these values when setting up your Facebook Webhook.
botSettings.webhookHint: Paste this in Facebook Developer App → Messenger → Webhooks → Callback URL
botSettings.eachPageHint: Each connected Facebook Page has its own unique Verify Token. Go to the FB Pages tab to see yours.
botSettings.businessCategoryDesc: Drives what your AI Receptionist knows and which leads it captures.

aiTraining.title: AI Training
aiTraining.subtitle: Train your bot with AI or configure manually.
aiTraining.saved: Settings saved! Bot will use these immediately.
aiTraining.wizardDesc: I'll ask you simple questions about your business and how you want the bot to reply. Then I'll configure everything automatically.
aiTraining.wizardHelper: Answer the questions → Click "Apply Settings" when done — it merges and saves automatically
aiTraining.paymentMethodsPh: Cash on Delivery, Card, Bank Transfer…
aiTraining.outOfStockPh: Sorry, this item is out of stock.
aiTraining.faqDesc: Add common questions customers ask. Use suggestions below to get started quickly.

autoReply.title: Auto-Reply Rules
autoReply.subtitle: Keyword-based instant replies (bypasses AI).
autoReply.keywordsHint: When a customer message contains any of these words, this reply is sent instantly.
autoReply.responseAltPh: Optional second-language version of the same reply…
autoReply.noRulesDesc: Add keyword triggers for instant responses. Use the templates above to get started!
autoReply.deliveryResp: We deliver within 2-3 business days. Standard delivery rates apply.
autoReply.paymentResp: We accept Cash on Delivery and other payment methods.
autoReply.returnResp: If there's any issue with the product, let us know within 3 days for a return or exchange.
autoReply.hoursResp: We're open every day from 10 AM to 10 PM.

users.subtitle: Search, adjust credits, suspend, or remove users.
users.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or user ID…
users.deleteConfirmDesc: This removes the user and ALL their data (products, orders, pages, credits). This cannot be undone.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: Sell the bot via Stripe checkout — set up once.
payments.stripeDesc: Accept card payments globally. When you're ready, connect your Stripe account and we'll wire up subscriptions and credit top-ups automatically.
payments.willEnableLater: You can enable this later — leave it for now.

pricing.title: Pricing & Plans
pricing.subtitle: Global rates applied to every bot reply.
pricing.textCostHint: Charged when the bot sends a text-only message.
pricing.imageCostHint: Charged when the bot proactively sends a product image.
pricing.signupBonusHint: Credits automatically granted to every new user on signup.
